selectedWorkOrder.title: Link Review Queue Evidence Missing to a real filter
selectedWorkOrder.selectedReason: The route already computed zero-evidence review rows and supported evidenceStatus=attached, so evidenceStatus=missing was an exact, scoped complement without changing permissions or evidence visibility.

candidateScores.decision: rejected: less workflow value than route-backed filter

changes: Added evidenceStatus=missing parsing/filtering and summary.evidenceMissing to /api/site/review-queue.
Added a Review Queue Evidence Missing metric and preset that syncs evidenceStatus=missing into URL state.
Updated focused route/UI/dashboard/navigation/deeplink verifiers and run documentation.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No roles, permissions, auth checks, tenant scope, site scope, program scope, mentor scope, or student visibility were broadened.
The filter only narrows the existing submitted/revision Review Queue rows already authorized for the current role.
Evidence bodies and storage identifiers remain hidden; the UI shows counts and row context only.

finalPassed: JSON parse for state and this manifest
validation.notes: git diff --check reported CRLF normalization warnings only.

handoff.evidence: Review Queue supports evidenceStatus=missing, surfaces an Evidence Missing metric, syncs URL state, and verifies zero-evidence scoped rows.
handoff.unlocks: Staff can distinguish evidence-ready review work from review rows that need evidence confirmation before approval.
handoff.next: Run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available, or inspect Review Queue evidence/status empty-state guidance.
handoff.blockers: Hosted permission/browser proof still needs credentialed runtime; missing-submission filters still lack exact product-safe queue semantics.
handoff.doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Review Queue Evidence Missing unless regression removes evidenceStatus=missing, summary.evidenceMissing, or evidence-missing-review verifier coverage.
handoff.firstFileToInspectNextRun: scripts/check-workspace-hosted-permissions.mjs if credentials/runtime are available; otherwise workspace.js reviewQueueEmptyState()
